message:
Merge PR #2696: gt doctor: use DefaultConfig for port resolution

Uses doltserver.DefaultConfig(townRoot).Port instead of hardcoded 3307
fallback. Ensures doctor probes the same port the server actually uses
(respecting config.yaml, GT_DOLT_PORT env, and daemon.json).

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2696
Author: Random-Word
